mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (user_id, resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, start_at, end_at, status, approval_level) VALUES (#{userId}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{status}, #{approvalLevel})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations WHERE deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, resource_id AS resourceId, resource_name AS resourceName, resource_type AS resourceType, start_at AS startAt, end_at AS endAt, status, approval_level AS approvalLevel, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, resource_id AS resourceId, resource_name AS resourceName, resource_type AS resourceType, start_at AS startAt, end_at AS endAt, status, approval_level AS approvalLevel, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

select.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, resource_id AS resourceId, resource_name AS resourceName, resource_type AS resourceType, start_at AS startAt, end_at AS endAt, status, approval_level AS approvalLevel, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations WHERE status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations WHERE status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' AND deleted = FALSE
select.update: UPDATE reservations SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
